description_long: This object is a stylized male construction worker standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He wears a blue short-sleeve shirt, dark gray work pants that are rolled up to mid-calf, and black shoes with white socks. His accessories include a black cap with a headset, a black crossbody bag, and gray fingerless gloves. The figure's face is partially obscured by the cap, and he has a visible earpiece and microphone. The overall appearance is casual and functional, but lacks standard construction safety gear such as a helmet or reflective vest. The character's build and attire suggest he is ready for light-duty urban work or supervision rather than heavy construction.
description: A stylized male construction worker in a blue shirt, dark pants, and black cap, with a headset and crossbody bag, but lacking standard safety gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the worker's face, blue shirt, gloves, and headset clearly, with arms outstretched and bag strap across the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, headset, and the crossbody bag resting on the back, as well as the rolled-up pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full crossbody bag, and the back of the shirt and pants, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the headset, cap, and bag, with the right arm and glove visible.
